text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One fine weekend while on a shopping trip, I see
two familiar faces...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: It's okay, right? Just a little won't hurt, will it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This... is not right... You cannot... get away with
such...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, heya! Perfect timing. I was just telling
McQueen about my go-to cake shop.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You must help me, I beg of you! Nature is trying
to seduce me with sweet temptations!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Seduce?! I just was caught up in singing the
praises of my favorite place, is all.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
In fact, they're apparently running an
all-you-can-eat event today! Good reason to pop
in, right?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
And, well, you're always working so hard. A little
cake won't hurt.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: B-but... it's all-you-can-eat! How can I possibly resist those cakes?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Look at that frosting! It's like snowdrops
blooming in a field covered in the softest powder
snow!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The fruits are the jewels that adorn it, wrapped in
a blanket of golden syrup that is the breath of
civilization...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Gulp... What. A. Wordsmith.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Listening to you is making me hungry! Dang... So this is sweets seduction!
choice_data_list: Cutting weight is not going to be so sweet.
Cutting weight is not going to be so sweet.
You'll be fine. Just a little won't hurt.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Listening to you is making me hungry! Dang... So this is sweets seduction!
choice_data_list: Cutting weight is not going to be so sweet.
Cutting weight is not going to be so sweet.
You'll be fine. Just a little won't hurt.

text_block_list.name: The Two
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: W-well, indulging in just one delicious treat should be luxury enough for us, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Quite right...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, they enjoy the cakes in moderation.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah... this is all our efforts bearing fruit.
Yeah... That's it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I too have made up my mind. To refuse such an
opportunity would be disrespectful to the cakes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Are you ready, Nature? Let's dig in with the same
spirit we would if we were sprinting down the
slopes of Yodo!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Right! Let's get to it!

text_block_list.name: Nature and McQueen
text_block_list.text: Mmmmm! It's sooooo good!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, they enjoy the cakes to their hearts'
content.
